title: Genital ulcer documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports history, examination, ulcer site and number, lymph-node, systemic, pregnancy, HIV and clinician-selected syphilis, herpes or other evaluation context while stating that history and examination alone may be inaccurate.
examination.rationale: Supports entered lesion and clinician-selected evaluation context while preserving diagnostic uncertainty.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports history, examination, ulcer site and number, lymph-node, systemic, pregnancy, HIV and clinician-selected syphilis, herpes or other evaluation context while stating that history and examination alone may be inaccurate.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, anatomy, site, number, appearance, pain, systemic features, exposure, pregnancy, immune status, examination and tests are absent.
No STI, cause, test, treatment, partner action, safeguarding or reporting conclusion is generated.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
